title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 265.499 - Remedies not to be exclusive, certain grocery retailers to be exempt
text:
265.499.  Remedies not to be exclusive, certain grocery retailers to be exempt. — 1.  The remedies provided in sections 265.490 to 265.499 are in addition to and not in substitution for any other remedies provided by law.
  2.  Sections 265.490 to 265.499 shall not apply to a regularly licensed mercantile establishment with a permanent place of business which has an inventory of other grocery products with a wholesale value in excess of fifteen thousand dollars.
(L. 1985 H.B. 409 & 532 §§ 32, 33)
